title: My first time. Shyness, pleasure, a man's eyes.
overview: "Will you be my fiancee?". Nano is a very hard working popular teacher at school but is a very shy and inexperienced with romance. One day, she gets an idea of a matchmaking and met a very nice guy, only until she finds out that he was Souji, a student and a troublemaker from her school...

title: Caught. Can't stop. Forbidden action.
overview: "I'll teach you stuff as my fiancee" Even after Nano finds out about Souji, he still won't stop approaching Nano. Also, both parents look to be happy with the two getting together, leaving Nano no escape route. What can she do...!?

title: Just the two. Red face. Confession out of the blue
overview: Are you looking forward for more? Souji makes stonger approaches to Nano, leading her to tears. But seeing Souji's childish side and his real character, Nano starts to have a different feeling for him...

title: Jealousy and resolution when his brother appears.
overview: I had a crush on you all this time After getting confessed from Souji, Nano can't stop thinking about him. But in a meeting with his family members about Souji's course, she meets his brother, Souichiro, her real matchmaking partner...

title: A feverish night, touching each other in his room.
overview: You really are aggressive today Souichiro comes to school looking for Souji telling Nano that he can't find him. Nano manages to find Souji but he was down sick. She takes care of him over the night and...

title: A one night vacation. Feelings and bodies, coming together.
overview: I won't be able to stop myself middle way through... You ok? Souji asks Nano to come with him to a one night trip. By understanding the meaning of joining him in the trip, Nano agrees to join him but trouble awaits them. Can they have their first time...?

title: "I won't wait." Another day of future planning, down the drain.
overview: Does a kiss really feel good? Can you teach me? At last the pair get together. The days as real lovers start but Souji seems concerned about the age difference between them. He tells Nano his feelings when they are together and...

title: Out of breath, taking off his glasses, losing his self-control.
overview: Do you really love Souji? Nano finds Souji hugging a girl and since then, she starts wondering about their relationship. She meets Souichiro and goes for a drink and gets told a shocking information...

title: Enter "the lover", the fires of jealousy
overview: Even you will fall in love with my brother at some point At the school festival, Souichiro comes to visit Nano to her class and the students think they are going out. Souji saw the scene and takes Nano to a restricted area to...

title: Pain, tears and all different feelings.
overview: Tell them that you're mine Nano breaks the promise and helps her student, leading to Nano getting hurt inside her. Also, when Souichiro saw that Nano was hurt inside, he couldn't stop his feelings too...

title: Repeated words of affection and sweet kisses.
overview: After Souji found out who Souichiro loves and desides to step down thinking that would be the best decision for Nano. Souichiro gives Nano a surprising proposal...

title: My matchmaking partner is my student, an aggressive troublemaker.
overview: Even so, I still love you, Kuga Nano expresses her true feelings and the pair becomes a true couple. Even if the teacher and student situation has not changed, they don't have any worries on their face. The finale of the school love story!
